name: APEX Blind Postman

nodes.name: Watch Hub Folder
nodes.notes: PRIMARY trigger. Windows FSW unreliable â€” Poll Fallback catches misses. Idempotency guard in foreman.py prevents double-processing.

nodes.name: Poll Fallback 30s
nodes.notes: FALLBACK: Catches files missed by FSW after sleep/wake/reconnect. Runs every 30s.

nodes.name: Route by Receiver
nodes.notes: ZERO-KNOWLEDGE RELAY: reads meta.receiver only. Output 0=foreman, 1=originator, 2=claudeclaw, 3=unknown

nodes.name: Execute Foreman
nodes.notes: Runs foreman.py with --ticket path. Timeout: 600s (foreman has its own internal per-task timeout).

nodes.name: Telegram Error Alert
nodes.notes: Configure TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env var in n8n or hardcode Michael's chat ID. Link credential 'Telegram Bot (ClaudeClaw)' to bot token.

nodes.name: Notify ClaudeClaw
nodes.notes: POST ticket to ClaudeClaw /internal/ticket. 3 retries x 5s. If ClaudeClaw down after retries, neverError=true prevents workflow failure â€” ticket falls through to Relay Log.

_importNotes: All paths corrected for QNAP NAS Linux filesystem.
